scope_statement: Saudi Food and Drug Authority (SFDA) public medical device, food, drug, cosmetics, and feed regulations and guidance documents published on sfda.gov.sa.
scope_exclusions: SFDA enforcement actions and warning letters (not published on the regulations portal)
Draft guidance and public consultation papers (not yet in force)
Arabic full-text body content (only Arabic titles are attached where PDF paths match)
Per-article provision extraction (documents are ingested as whole rows)
SFDA fee schedules, tariff tables, and licence-application forms

sources.name: SFDA Laws and Regulations
sources.completeness_note: English portal scraped across 13 paginated listings; 112 PDFs ingested, 2 kept as metadata-only due to corrupt or non-PDF upstream files.

gaps.description: Arabic full-text content of documents (only Arabic titles attached where PDF paths match)
gaps.reason: Arabic portal serves the same document set under different path structure; unified ingestion deferred.
Document-specific heuristics required; out of scope for initial ingest.
Not published on the public regulations portal.

gaps.description: Draft guidance and public consultation papers
gaps.reason: Not yet in force; out of scope for a regulations MCP.

gaps.description: 2 of 112 documents produced empty full_text (1 corrupt PDF, 1 DOCX served in PDF slot)
gaps.reason: Upstream file quality; rows retained with title + URL for discoverability.

tools.name: sa_sfda_search_regulations
tools.description: Full-text search across SFDA regulations, requirements, and guidance documents.

tools.name: sa_sfda_get_regulation
tools.description: Get a specific regulation or guidance document by reference.

tools.name: sa_sfda_search_guidance
tools.description: Search SFDA guidance documents with framework/domain filters.

tools.name: sa_sfda_list_frameworks
tools.description: List all SFDA regulatory frameworks and guidance series.

tools.name: sa_sfda_about
tools.description: Server metadata, version, coverage summary, and tool list.

tools.name: sa_sfda_list_sources
tools.description: Data provenance: sources, retrieval method, update frequency, licensing.

tools.name: sa_sfda_check_data_freshness
tools.description: Database build date and per-source staleness report.
